description: Change the current user's NetSuite login credentials (email address and password).

methods.name: changeEmail
methods.description: Changes the current user's NetSuite email address (user name).

params.name: options.newEmail
params.description: The logged in user's NetSuite new email address

params.name: options.password
params.description: The logged in user's current NetSuite password

params.name: options.onlyThisAccount
params.description: If true, the email change applies only to the current account. If false, applies to all accounts. Default is true.

methods.name: changePassword
methods.description: Changes the current user's NetSuite password.
